message:
chore(beads): close TUI Glamour Upgrade and Overlay-Feed Integration campaigns

Campaigns completed:
- TUI Glamour Upgrade (br-phdna): Full Charmbracelet ecosystem integration
  - Phase 1: Mouse support
  - Phase 2: Bubbles integration (spinner, progress, help, table, viewport, list)
  - Phase 3: Dashboard decomposition, focus ring
  - Phase 4: Huh forms, Harmonica animations, toast enhancements
  - Phase 5: VHS tests, performance benchmarks, FINAL verification

- Overlay-Feed Integration (br-x66gc): Bridge human/agent control surfaces
  - T1-T9: Attention panel, badge, cursor propagation, overlay commands
  - 346 integration tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
